Add your product images in this folder.

Use these exact filenames so they show automatically on the website:

- sandalwood-agarbatti.png
- rose-agarbatti.png
- lavender-agarbatti.png
- 3-in-1-assorted-agarbatti-pack.png
- pure-camphor.png
- pooja-oil.png
- cotton-wicks.png
- sandalwood-dhoop-sticks.png
- kumkum.png
- turmeric.png

If you change the extension or filenames, update the matching `image` values in:

- frontend/src/data/products.js
- backend/data/defaultProducts.js
